verification_instructions: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
environment_constraints: No test framework configured. Verification is via TypeScript type checking only.
key_patterns: Zustand store in src/store/gameStore.ts. Game logic pure functions in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. Components in src/components/. i18n with en.ts and es.ts. ClanShield component accepts clanId and size props. CLANS array in src/types/game.ts has color field per clan. Popup pattern: overlay div with class monster-placement-popup used in GameBoard.tsx.
directory_structure: src/components/ - UI components. src/store/ - Zustand store. src/utils/ - game logic functions. src/types/ - TypeScript types. src/i18n/ - translations. src/img/ - clan images.
